title: Tools for Thought
html:
What I missed from Roam when using Logseq

  • Inline block references.
  • Contextual navigation.
  • If I click an a reference, depends the context it either jump to the location or expand the current context.
  • The ability to edit the mention with keyboard navigation. Things feel more first class.

What Roam lacks of from Logseq

  • Local-interop with other tools
    • Though there's a noisy outline collapsing state problem
